description: This pipeline applies a series of image processing operations to smooth and enhance the input data, starting by applying convolution with a Gaussian function for smoothing, followed by an auto-thresholding algorithm that groups the data based on annotations, allowing for the separation of different components within the data.

ece6ccc1-693b-4480-ae73-86a1d39d7cbc.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
ece6ccc1-693b-4480-ae73-86a1d39d7cbc.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

f3b0be03-4f8f-4767-8d9a-08e017ae1964.name: ij1-blur-gaussian2d
f3b0be03-4f8f-4767-8d9a-08e017ae1964.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.
